title: map.list input
description: List component-to-trait mappings, optionally filtered by external system.

externalSystem.description: Filter mappings to a specific external system (e.g., 'material').

cursor.description: Pagination cursor. Use the previous page's nextCursor to continue. When cursor or limit is provided, pagination defaults to 100 items per page.

limit.description: Page size for pagination. Omitting both cursor and limit preserves the legacy full-list response.
